name: Jack-o-Lantern Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour once, then measure and add baking soda and salt, sifting together three times.
2. Cream butter thoroughly, gradually adding sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs, beating well; then add melted chocolate and blend.
4. Alternately add flour with water, a small amount at a time, mixing after each addition until smooth.
5. Bake in two greased deep 9-inch layer pans in a 350°F oven for 30 minutes, or until done.
6. Spread orange tinted frosting between layers, reserving about ¼ for pumpkin decoration.
7. Spread chocolate frosting on top and sides of the cake, reserving some for decorating.
8. Decorate the top of the cake with pumpkin or orange tinted frosting.
9. Outline eyes, nose, and mouth of jack-o’-lantern faces with chocolate frosting using a pastry tube or small knife.
10. Melt chocolate as needed for outlining jack-o’-lantern faces.
